_comment: Example MCP client config for the SocialGO MCP server. Drop one `socialgo` entry into your MCP-capable client's config (e.g. Claude Desktop's claude_desktop_config.json, under `mcpServers`). SOCIALGO_API_KEY is FULLY OPTIONAL: the server runs without it and the guest tools (socialgo_guest_services, socialgo_guest_gateways, socialgo_guest_order, socialgo_guest_order_status) are 100% keyless — use them to buy without an account. The key is needed ONLY for reseller/account tools (balance, place_order, wallet, ...). Pick ONE of the two blocks below. NEVER commit a real API key.

mcpServers._guest_mode_no_key: Use this when you have NO account / NO API key. Set only SOCIALGO_API_URL. The guest tools work without any key.
mcpServers._reseller_mode_with_key: Use this INSTEAD of the block above only if you have an account. Rename it to `socialgo` and add SOCIALGO_API_KEY from Dashboard > API Key.
